testcase.name: test_reel_generation_input_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected validation error, got: 200 assert 200 in [400, 422] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_strict.py:274: in test_reel_generation_input_validation assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected validation error, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected validation error, got: 200 E assert 200 in [400, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_plans

failure.message: AssertionError: Plans endpoint failed: 404 assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_e2e_strict.py:327: in test_get_plans assert response.status_code == 200, f"Plans endpoint failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Plans endpoint failed: 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
